diagrams.title: System Call Interface - User Mode to Kernel Mode Transition
diagrams.description: Shows the transition from user application through system call interface to kernel and back
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how privileged operations are requested safely

diagrams.title: fork() System Call - Process Creation
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the fork operation creating two processes from one
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how fork() duplicates a process and both continue execution

diagrams.title: File Descriptor Table Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how file descriptors map to open files in the operating system
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how file descriptors reference files across system tables

diagrams.title: Process States and System Calls
diagrams.description: Shows process lifecycle with relevant system calls at each state
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process lifecycle and when system calls are used
